mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_buyer_channel WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}
AND channel_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
SELECT * FROM tb_buyer_channel WHERE channel_id = #{channelId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_buyer_channel ( tenant_id, company_id, platform_id, channel_name, api_key, api_secret, shop_id, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{companyId}, #{platformId}, #{channelName}, #{apiKey}, #{apiSecret}, #{shopId}, #{status}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_buyer_channel SET company_id = #{companyId}, platform_id = #{platformId}, channel_name = #{channelName}, api_key = #{apiKey}, api_secret = #{apiSecret}, shop_id = #{shopId}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE channel_id = #{channelId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_buyer_channel WHERE channel_id = #{channelId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
